title: crTool Batch File
description: Schema for crTool batch operation files. An array of commands to execute in sequence.

command.description: The operation to perform. 'extract' extracts a C2PA manifest to crJSON; 'profile' evaluates a crJSON against a YAML asset profile; 'test-cases' creates signed test assets from a test case JSON file; 'validate' validates JSON files against the crJSON schema.

arguments.description: Additional command-line arguments for the operation (e.g. ["-o", "output/", "--profile", "profile.yaml"]).

inputFiles.description: Input file paths or glob patterns to process (e.g. ["input.jpg", "images/*.png"]).
